content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (post-319)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
1. **D3‚Ä≤ `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (PTC L879) ‚Äî all ingredients now in-file.** The 4 square coherences (Sq1 iter-314, Sq2b `pullbackComp_Œ¥`, Sq4 `pullbackValIso_comp` iter-319, Sq3 `sheafifyTensorUnitIso`) all exist. Remaining = ONLY the interleaved mate-calculus assembly (~100‚Äì300 LOC). **Method directive (mandatory):** develop in the FAST SCRATCH LOOP ‚Äî `import AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjSubstrate` (prebuilt olean, ~15‚Äì35 s elaboration) and reproduce `restrict` with the 4 squares as `sorry`-haves; do NOT iterate blind on the real file (LSP times out, 9-min builds). The prover left the exact reproduction recipe at the bottom of `task_results/AlgebraicJacobian_Picard_TensorObjSubstrate_PullbackTensorComp.lean.md`. This is a clean prover lane.
2. **FBC `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (FCHI L438) body.** Crisp, named, per-œÉ single-open S-level base change. Route: `S.isoSpec` to reach `S = Spec R`, then iter-318 bridge altitude-2 (`pushPullObj_pushforward_iso_tilde`) + sorry-free `cech_degree_affine_baseChange` for the restricted affine pushout square. This is the affine-reduction heart but is now ISOLATED. Likely effort-break candidate if it stalls (it's the genuine multi-hundred-LOC piece).

## Needs blueprint work BEFORE the next prover (HARD GATE inputs)
- **`pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` ‚Äî NEW, UNMATCHED (DAG `unmatched`).** blueprint-writer owed: add a `\lean{AlgebraicGeometry.pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange}` block in `Cohomology_CechHigherDirectImage.tex`. Statement: per-intersection-open S-level base change `g^*(f_*(p_*p^*F)) ‚âÖ f'_*(g'^*(p_*p^*F))` at `pushPullObj F (Over.mk (coverInterOpen ùí∞ œÉ).Œπ)` for cartesian `h`, affine `S`/`S'`. `\uses{lem:pushPullObj_iso_tilde, lem:cech_degree_affine_baseChange, lem:affine_pushforward_pullback_baseChange}`. (lvb-fbc-319 MAJOR.)
- **FBC leaf proofs under-specified (lvb-fbc-319 MAJOR).** Both leaf `\begin{proof}` blocks argue on a single affine fibre power and never preview (a) the coproduct/product decomposition `pushPull_sigma_iso` + `PreservesProduct.iso` the Lean `app` actually performs, nor (b) the X-level `twisted` residual: the base-changed-cover obstruction `[Finite ùí∞'.I‚ÇÄ]`/`[‚àÄ i, IsAffine (ùí∞'.X i)]`. Writer should record both, plus `[Finite ùí∞.I‚ÇÄ]` in the signature prose (MINOR). This is the **decision the planner must make for the twisted leaf**: either (i) add `[IsAffine S']` + derive base-changed-cover affineness, or (ii) add the geometric cover-base-change identification `coverInterOpen ùí∞' œÉ = g'‚Åª¬π(U_œÉ)`. Pick one before sending a prover at `twisted_cech_nerve_iso`'s RHS ‚Äî otherwise it re-walls (verified: instance synthesis currently fails).
- **PTC Sq4-chain blueprint prose error (lvb-ptc-319 MAJOR, blueprint-side only ‚Äî Lean is correct).** blueprint-writer owed on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`: (A) fix backwards `pullbackComp` orientation (Mathlib `Sheaf.lean:232` = `h*‚àòf*‚âÖ(h‚àòf)*`; the displayed `(h‚àòf)*‚âÖh*‚àòf*` flips the `.hom`/`.inv` labels ‚Äî the Lean uses `.inv` correctly); (B) reconcile the displayed RHS (currently through `pullbackValIso h (f*M)`/`Œµ^Y` over the sheaf) to the actual Lean factorization (through `h*(pullbackValIso f M)` over the presheaf `pb^pre f M.val`); (C) refresh stale "Sq1 is the open target" D3‚Ä≤ status prose. A `% NOTE` is already placed at `lem:sheafCompPb_counit_comp_coherence`. Non-blocking for the D3‚Ä≤ prover (the residual is the assembly, not these blocks), but should be cleaned in the same writer pass.

## Stale `.lean` comments (auditor MAJOR ‚Äî review can't edit `.lean`; prover/planner action)
- FCHI module docstring (top) says "three named leaves" ‚Äî iter-319 extracted a FOURTH (`pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange`). Update when a prover next touches the file.
- PTC module docstring says Sq4 is "still to build" ‚Äî `pullbackValIso_comp` is now closed. Update.
- Stale "left for follow-up" comment inside the already-completed `pullbackComp_Œ¥` proof.

## Do NOT retry without a structural change
- **`twisted_cech_nerve_iso` RHS-match** ‚Äî do NOT re-dispatch as-is; it WILL re-wall on missing `[Finite ùí∞'.I‚ÇÄ]`/`[‚àÄ i, IsAffine (ùí∞'.X i)]`. Resolve the signature/cover-base-change decision (above) FIRST.
- **`pullback_preservesFiniteLimits` (FCHI L154)** ‚Äî the abstract left-adjoint / no-stalk-functor wall (ARCHON_MEMORY); leaf-1, untouched, not a fresh-prover target.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (banked to Knowledge Base)
- **Coproduct/product decomposition of the ƒåech push‚Äìpull leaf**: `Y‚Çô = ‚àê_œÉ coverInterOpen ùí∞ œÉ`; `pushPull_sigma_iso` (`[Finite ùí∞.I‚ÇÄ]`) ‚Üí `‚àè_œÉ`; `pushforward`/`pullback` preserve via `Limits.PreservesProduct.iso` + `Limits.Pi.mapIso` ‚Üí reduces a degreewise Beck‚ÄìChevalley `app` mechanically to a per-œÉ single-open base change. (FBC, iter-319.)
- **Site-defeq-safe iso cancellation**: when a categorical cancellation would force `F.map (ùüô _)` and detonate the Scheme/Sheaf-site defeq, repackage the comparison as an explicit `Iso` palindrome (`Tiso`) so the cancellation is `Iso.hom_inv_id` (a plain `ùüô`, never `F.map ùüô`); pair with `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false`. `NatIso.app` does NOT exist ‚Äî build the component `Iso.mk` by hand. (D3‚Ä≤, iter-319.)

## DAG / structural
- `archon dag-query unmatched`: 382 `lean_aux` nodes, overwhelmingly OFF-FRONT (Grassmannian/GenericFreeness/QuotScheme helpers). Only the active-front addition this iter is `pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange` (covered above); the 3 new PTC decls are MATCHED to existing pins. The 382 backlog is a held-lane debt ‚Äî restore when those lanes reopen, not now.
- Blueprint-doctor broken `\cref/\uses`: `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (2: `gr_glueChartComponent_leg_compat`, `gr_glueChartFamily_pullback_map_pi`) + `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13). All in HELD lanes ‚Äî repoint when those chapters reopen.
